MELItem.Title: Passenger Entry Door Flight Lock Systems

ListItem.Para: Associated door is verified to be capable of being opened before each departure.
Flight Attendant(s) monitor the affected door handle when cabin differential pressure is less than 1.5 psi.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the associated passenger entry door is capable of being opened before each departure using the interior handle (AMM DDG 52-11-05).

ListItem.Para: Set EPAS safety switch to SAFE.
Set the door mode select handle to the disarmed/manual (green band) position.
Rotate the inside door handle to the open position. Open door slightly.
Close door and rotate handle back to closed position.
Set EPAS safety switch to NORMAL.
Each affected door must be monitored by a person employed by the operator when cabin differential pressure is less than 1.5 psi to ensure door handle is not operated by passengers.
Flight crew should inform cabin crew when monitoring is required.
